Off Calendar Mar-13-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-13-2012 Continued To Mar-12-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Plaintiff Mark Bertrand. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Mar-12-2013 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-04-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-11-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
John Fitzpatrick Vannucci, 415.981.7500, specially appearing for the Plaintiff;
Marissa Nebenzahl Sinha, McDowell Shaw Colman & Garcia, 925.210.1300, appearing for the Defendants.

Ruling: DEFENDANT ANDERSON ENTERPRISES, INC., ROYAL MOTOR SALES, DANIEL WILSON'S Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted; Request For Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED. Plaintiff, Mark A. Bertrand, is deemed to have admitted each of Defendants' requests for admissions. Plaintiff is hereby ordered to pay Defendants' counsel $885.00 in monetary sanctions. Order signed. Anthony Schoenberg, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: SARAH E. TESCONI'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF MARK BERTRAND.
Appearances: Marissa M. Nebenzahl of the Law Office of McDowell Shaw Coleman & Garcia (925.210.1300) for defendant and opposing party; William S. Ginsburg of Berg Injury Lawyers (510.523.3200) counsel for plaintiff and moving to be relieved appearing via Court Call.
Discussed. The court passed the matter to hear from Mr. Ginsburg in camera.
After in camera review (which was not reported), the court granted the motion. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
